hero.desc:
Structural solutions for the biggest events in Latin America.
Box Truss · Platforms · Custom Projects for your event.

products.label: Catalogue
products.title: Our
products.boxtruss_desc: Lines Q-15, Q-30 and Q-50. Lightweight and resistant for any event scale.
products.praticaveis_desc: Elevated stages and floors with structural resistance and quick assembly.
products.bases_desc: Solid foundation for all structure configurations.
products.acessorios_desc: Sleeves, hinges, barriers and high-precision connectors.

about.label: Why Selum
about.title: What sets us
about.item1_desc: Full process control — from raw aluminium to the final product, in Joinville, SC.
about.item2_desc: We understand events can't wait. On-time delivery is part of our product.
about.item3_desc: Carefully selected aluminium for lightness, durability and corrosion resistance.
about.quote: Structures that support major events must be built by those who understand every detail of aluminium.
